scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/pi/wrapper/cli.ts --format cjs --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external keytar --external @quantdesk/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:e2e: tsup e2e/*-probe.ts --format cjs --outDir e2e-dist --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external keytar --external @quantdesk/shared --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/pi/wrapper/cli.ts --format cjs --watch --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external keytar --external @quantdesk/shared
